policy: Local deterministic surfaces are labeled as tools, not external human adoption or model-provider evidence.

local-deterministic-grader.label: Fixture-local deterministic execution and marker grader
local-deterministic-grader.limitation: This is a repository-owned tool surface, not an independent model surface.

codex-cli-default.delta: weak and repaired prompts tied on outcome checks
codex-cli-default.evidence: recorded transcripts and marker outcome scoring
codex-cli-default.limitation: single model/tool surface; marker scoring remains secondary

local-deterministic-grader.delta: repaired artifact passes where weak artifact fails
local-deterministic-grader.evidence: fixture-local artifact execution where grader exists
local-deterministic-grader.limitation: repository-owned deterministic tool surface, not independent model evidence
